layman_headline: Ethereum shows early reversal signs in a fearful market — a cautious swing entry.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fear state with Bitcoin around $64K and most altcoins pulling back. Ethereum has been quietly building momentum with a strong Three White Soldiers candlestick pattern on its chart, suggesting sustained buying pressure is emerging. The price sits near $1,860 with support at $1,900 on the chart (though current price has already dipped below that reference), and resistance at $2,000 offers a clear 7-8% upside target. News about stablecoin adoption by Samsung Wallet and Philippine banks adds a positive backdrop for the Ethereum ecosystem.
layman_action: Consider a small position in Ethereum near $1,850 with a strict stop-loss at $1,780. This is a cautious trade in a fearful market — don't go all-in. Take profits if ETH approaches $2,000.
expert_reasoning: ETH presents the most balanced swing setup among the candidates. The Three White Soldiers pattern with 19.9% 5-day momentum indicates genuine buying pressure returning despite the broader downtrend. RSI at 44 is neutral — not overbought, leaving room for upside. The chart R/R of 2.55x to $2,000 resistance with $1,900 support is favorable. BTC dominance at 56.6% is a headwind for alts, but ETH's massive $41.4B TVL ecosystem and institutional-grade profile make it the most defensible alt position. News catalysts around stablecoin integration (Samsung, Philippine banks) and Blockworks noting 'ETH derivatives reset' suggest smart money is repositioning. Confidence is capped at moderate levels given Fear index at 28, high BTC dominance suppressing alts, and missing funding rate / volume data.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to squeeze altcoin valuations — if BTC drops to $62K, ETH could break below $1,780 stop
Fear & Greed at 28 with declining trend suggests broader market hasn't found a bottom yet
EU sanctions targeting $120B crypto network could create regulatory uncertainty and selling pressure
watch_list: BTC price action around $64K-$65K — a break below $63K would invalidate the ETH setup
ETH holding above $1,850 support and any volume confirmation of the Three White Soldiers pattern
Fear & Greed index trajectory — improvement above 35 would validate the reversal thesis
market_context: Crypto markets are in a fear state (28/100) with BTC stable near $64K. Bitcoin options show a bullish $5B cluster, but high BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to suppress altcoin performance.
context_banner: Ethereum shows a bullish candlestick reversal pattern in a fearful market, offering a 2.5x risk/reward swing entry toward $2,000.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 44 is neutral with room to run, while BONK (29) and STX (35) are oversold but in stronger downtrends — ETH offers better structure.
Three White Soldiers pattern on ETH with 2.55x risk/reward ratio to $2,000 resistance — the strongest constructive pattern among all candidates.
Fear index at 28 with 'improving' trend from week average of 28.4 — fear is elevated but not extreme, suggesting contrarian opportunity with caution.
Samsung Wallet stablecoin support and Philippine bank BPI stablecoin pilot signal growing institutional demand for Ethereum-based infrastructure.
Bitcoin options $5B bullish cluster near $65K suggests BTC stability, which provides a stable floor for ETH to recover.
